sentence_segments.text: In a binary transmission system, one of two waveforms, \( s_1(t) \) or \( s_2(t) \), is transmitted within the interval \([0, T_b]\), as shown in the figure.
The transmitted signal is then superimposed with Gaussian white noise \( n_w(t) \) with a power spectral density of \( N_0 / 2 \), resulting in \( r(t) \).
